## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content performance and strategy for vendor pages.](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic spiked significantly, particularly for per diem and assets/liabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Vendor pages maintained steady performance; AI cluster increased despite reduced Google traffic](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Plans to enrich vendor pages with industry verticals, business maturity levels, and improved UX](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Focus on CRM tools for initial vertical expansion due to high search volumes](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Product team involvement expected for core vendor landing pages; may require content restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog pages saw a significant traffic spike, especially per diem pages (Washington page leading)](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Expense category pages maintained steady performance](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Assets and liabilities page had a large jump in sessions](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Treasury pages remained stable](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Vendor pages:](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Overall performance maintained](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
      - [AI cluster increased traffic despite reduced Google referrals](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
      - [Content creation, AI, and AI infrastructure in top 10 average Google position](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Observability entered top 15 position](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Vendor Page Enrichment Strategy

  - [Proposed additions:](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [New sections to current pages](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [UX improvements (e.g., horizontal tables for alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Industry vertical expansion (CRM tools as primary focus)](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Business maturity level content (startup, enterprise, mid-market)](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [AI model comparisons:](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [Focus on industry-specific use cases rather than business size](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
      - [Potential high-value traffic from product managers and researchers](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [CRM vertical expansion priorities:](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Healthcare, finance, and nonprofits show high search volumes](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Monday.com example: dedicated nonprofit website](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)

### Content Creation Plans

  - [Start with CRM tools for vertical expansion](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Explore project management, email marketing, and CMS tools](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Create templates for easy scaling of new content](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Focus on tool-specific AI content (e.g., Jasper AI, growthx.ai) rather than foundation models](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Compile list of vendors based on search volume to identify gaps in current coverage](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

### Product Team Involvement

  - [Expected to take over core vendor landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [May require moving existing content to subpages (e.g., "details")](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Developing strategy for pages with insufficient transaction data](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Aiming to add hundreds to thousands of new vendors](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Different editing workflow needed for various vendor page types](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

### Content Restrictions and Partnerships

  - [Avoid creating content for accounting platforms and partners](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Develop separate page experience for partners, showcasing only positive data](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create and send sample page templates with new sections for vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Explore CRM tool vertical expansion, starting with startup and enterprise segments](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of vendors based on search volume, identifying gaps in current coverage](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Ramp to work on improving dynamic data integration for charts on vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Await product team's decision on vendor page structure and data inclusion](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver content refreshes for Ramp's review](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Consider exploring untapped vendors in sales enablement, MarTech, and SalesTech spaces](https://fathom.video/share/yzGWm_kCCjPsE17tG_83NUW3A-_rdkDS?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
